title: UserGems Account
description: Schema for the UserGems Account object submitted via POST /v1/account. Identifies a target company UserGems should source prospects against.

name.description: Account name (display name of the target company).

domain.description: Primary domain for the target company (e.g. example.com).

reportName.description: Report or workflow grouping the account belongs to.

signal.description: Signal label associated with prospects routed for this account.

custom.description: Free-form custom metadata to round-trip with downstream events.
